docs.title: Exarep documentation
docs.text: Welcome to the Exarep project documentation. This site provides guides, architecture references, and everything you need to get started.

docs.title: Overview
docs.text: Exarep is designed and built following Red Hat best practices, leveraging open source technologies and enterprise-grade patterns.

docs.title: Quick links
docs.text:
• Getting started

    Set up your development environment and run Exarep locally.

    :octicons-arrow-right-24: Get started

  • Architecture

    Understand the system design, components, and how they interact.

    :octicons-arrow-right-24: Architecture

docs.title: Architecture
docs.text: An overview of the Exarep system architecture.

docs.title: Components
docs.text: Details on system components will be added as the project develops.

docs.title: Technology stack
docs.text: Layer Technology Runtime Quarkus Language Java (latest LTS) Frontend Angular with ng-bootstrap Database PostgreSQL Container Podman Orchestration OpenShift GitOps OpenShift GitOps (Argo CD) CI/CD OpenShift Pipelines Auth OIDC (Keycloak reference)

docs.title: Getting started
docs.text: Set up your development environment and run Exarep locally.

docs.title: Prerequisites
docs.text:
• RHEL/Fedora or compatible Linux distribution
  • Podman
  • Java (latest LTS)
  • Maven
  • Node.js (latest LTS)

docs.title: Running locally
docs.text: Details on running the project will be added as the project develops.
